{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} | founded={{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:Qq]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]]

It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:Qq]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:deleted revision storage]]

One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:Qq]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:deleted revision storage]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} | founded={{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:Qq]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:deleted revision storage]]

Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:pages needing proper jawiki and history import]] [[Category:Qq]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]]

Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages needing history import]] [[Category:Qq]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]]

revision.comment: 35 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:長浜八幡宮 up to rev 104212073
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 長浜八幡宮 |画像 = [[画像:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]宮前町13-55 |位置 = {{Coord|35|22|57.5|N|136|16|27.6|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[応神天皇|誉田別尊]]
[[仲哀天皇|足仲彦尊]]
[[神功皇后|息長足姫尊]] |社格 = 旧[[県社]]、[[別表神社]] |創建 = [[延久]]元年（[[1069年]]） |本殿 = [[神明造]] |札所等 = [[神仏霊場巡拝の道]]第137番（滋賀第5番）
[[六瓢箪めぐり]] |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = [[長浜曳山祭]]（4月12日～17日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=長浜八幡宮|coordinates= {{coord2|35|22|57.5|N|136|16|27.6|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|35|22|57.5|N|136|16|27.6|E}}}} }} [[画像:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|拝殿]] [[画像:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|摂社 都久夫須麻神社]] [[画像:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|参道の石灯籠]] [[File:Nagahama Hachiman-gu shrine in Nagahama from Ōmi-meisyo-zue.png|thumb|近江国名所図会]] [[File:長濱八幡宮 石碑.jpg|thumb|長浜八幡宮碑]] '''長浜八幡宮'''（ながはまはちまんぐう）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]宮前町にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は[[県社]]で、現在は[[神社本庁]]の[[別表神社]]。[[日本三大一覧#祭り|日本三大山車祭]]の「[[長浜曳山祭]]」で有名である。 == 祭神 == * 主祭神 - [[応神天皇|誉田別尊]]（中御前）、[[仲哀天皇|足仲彦尊]]（東御前）、[[神功皇后|息長足姫尊]]（西御前） == 歴史 == [[源義家]]は、[[前九年の役]]の際に[[陸奥国]]の[[安倍貞任]]・[[安倍宗任|宗任]]兄弟征討の祈願を[[弘仁]]5年（[[814年]]）に[[空海]]によって創建されたという[[新放生寺]]にて行った[https://syanain.wixsite.com/website 舎那院ホームページ]。その後、安倍兄弟を討伐した義家は祈願の功があったとして[[延久]]元年（[[1069年]]）に[[後三条天皇]]から新放生寺に勝軍山の勅号を賜わると同時に勅願を受けて、[[石清水八幡宮]]より祭神を[[分霊]]し[http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ 長浜八幡宮ホームページ 由緒]、[[神仏習合]]により新放生寺の境内にその境内社として社が創建された、それが当宮の始まりであるという。 当宮の当初の名称は勝軍山新放生寺八幡宮の他、坂田八幡宮あるいは坂田別宮八幡宮ともいい [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=195 滋賀県神社庁 長浜八幡宮]、新放生寺と合わせて社坊三百あまりを数え、本宮の石清水八幡宮をも凌ぐほどであったといわれる。 [[室町時代]]には[[室町幕府]]第6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]][[足利義教]]によって社殿が修補され、新放生寺に[[三重塔]]が建立されたり、太刀、神馬などが奉納されている。また、[[天文 (元号)|天文]]5年（[[1536年]]）には[[後奈良天皇]]より社領三千石を賜わり、[[小谷城]]主の[[浅井氏]]からも社領、太刀、神馬などが寄進されている。 しかし、[[元亀]]年間（[[1570年]] - [[1573年]]）に行われた[[織田信長]]と[[浅井長政]]との戦いに巻き込まれてしまい、新放生寺と当宮はほとんど焼失して衰退したが、[[天正]]2年（[[1574年]]）に[[長浜城 (近江国)|長浜城]]城主として[[豊臣秀吉|羽柴秀吉]]が長浜に来ると、秀吉は新放生寺と当宮の荒廃を惜しみ、寺社領七十石が寄進され、堂舎、社殿の再建がおこなわれて天正19年（[[1591年]]）に新放生寺と当宮の社殿は再興された。この史実は[[長浜曳山祭]]の起源ともいわれている。 秀吉が再興をはかり新放生寺の塔頭・妙覚院や学頭寺・[[舎那院]]をはじめ二十余坊が新放生寺と当宮の周囲に再建され、やがて七十坊となったが、[[慶長]]から[[寛永]]年間（[[1596年]] - [[1645年]]）には三十余坊、[[天和 (日本)|天和]]年間（[[1681年]] - [[1684年]]）には二十一坊と次第に衰えていった。 [[明治]]時代になると[[神仏分離]]によって新放生寺とその塔頭は廃寺とされたが、学頭寺の舎那院のみは残され、新放生寺や塔頭の[[仏像]]や資料等が全て移された。また、当宮は名称を長浜八幡宮と改めている。 [[1885年]]（明治18年）に雷火によって本殿が焼失したが、[[1889年]]（明治22年）に再建されている。[[1895年]]（明治28年）には[[県社]]に列せられている。 [[2006年]]（[[平成]]18年）に[[神社本庁]]の[[別表神社]]に加列されている。 当宮の東隣に舎那院がある。 == 境内 == * 本殿 - [[1889年]]（[[明治]]22年）再建。[[八幡宮]]としては非常にめずらしい[[神明造]]で建てられている。一説によれば[[伊勢神宮]]から御饌殿を譲り受けたともされる[http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ 長浜八幡宮ホームページ 境内 社殿]。 * 幣殿 * 拝殿 * 能舞台 * 神輿庫 * 願い通して矢 * 社務所 * 斎館 * 参集殿 * 放生池（長浜市指定[[名勝]]） * 包丁塚 * 絵馬堂 * [[アジサイ|あじさい]]園 - 現在休園中。 === 摂末社 === * [[都久夫須麻神社]] - 祭神：[[イチキシマヒメ|市杵島姫神]]。[[摂社]]。 * [[天満宮]] - 祭神：[[菅原道真]]。摂社。 * [[高良神社]] - 祭神：[[武内宿禰]]。摂社。 * [[金刀比羅宮]]・河濯（かわそぎ）神社 - 金刀比羅宮祭神：[[大物主命]]、河濯神社祭神：[[瀬織津姫]]命。摂社。 * 末広[[稲荷神社]] - 祭神：[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂]]、[[サタヒコ|佐田彦神]]、[[オオミヤノメ|大宮能売神]]。[[末社]]。 * [[地主神社]] - 祭神：[[地主神|大地主命]]。末社。 * [[熊野神社]]：祭神 - [[熊野権現|家津御子命、熊野速玉命、熊野夫須美命]]。末社。 == 文化財 == === 滋賀県指定有形文化財 === * 梅樹双雀文鏡 1面 - [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝時代]]。 * 能装束（紅地扇面散文様唐織能装束、縹淡茶段松皮菱牡丹輪宝文様唐織能装束） 2領 - [[江戸時代]]。 * 太鼓 1口、太鼓台 1基 - [[室町時代]]。[[文安]]元年、永尾護国寺等の墨書銘がある。 * 書跡等 [[永享]]七年勧進猿楽奉加帳ならびに永享十一年塔供養奉加帳 2帖 - 室町時代。 * 書跡等 版本倭点附刻妙法蓮華経 8巻 - 室町時代。 === 長浜市指定有形文化財 === * 鉄鋳造鍔口 1口 - [[桃山時代]]。 * 書跡 天正八年三月吉日[[豊臣秀吉|羽柴秀吉]]・同[[羽柴秀勝|秀勝]]連署奉加帳 1帖 - 桃山時代。 === 長浜市指定名勝 === * 放生池 - 桃山時代。 == 祭事 == * [[長浜曳山祭]] - 4月12日～17日朝。[[安土桃山時代]]に始まる伝統行事。日本三大山車祭の一つ。 * 春季大祭 - 4月15日 * 例祭 - 10月15日 == 前後の札所 == ; [[神仏霊場巡拝の道]] : 136 [[西明寺 (滋賀県甲良町)|西明寺]]　-　'''137 長浜八幡宮'''　-　138 [[宝厳寺]] ; [[六瓢箪めぐり]] == 所在地 == * 滋賀県長浜市宮前町13-55 == アクセス == * [[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[北陸本線]] [[長浜駅]]より徒歩約15分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 周辺情報 == * [[舎那院]] * [[浄土真宗|真宗]][[真宗大谷派|大谷派]] [[真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|長浜別院 大通寺]] * [[黒壁スクエア]] * [[長浜赤十字病院]] == 外部リンク == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ 曳山祭 長浜八幡宮] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:なかはまはちまんくう}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]] [[Category:別表神社]] [[Category:鎮守社]] [[Category:豊臣秀吉|社なかはま]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=滋賀県}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[長浜八幡宮]] to [[Nagahama Hachimangu]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

[[1645年]]）には三十余坊、[[天和 (日本)|天和]]年間（[[1681年]] - [[1684年]]）には二十一坊と次第に衰えていった。 [[明治]]時代になると[[神仏分離]]によって新放生寺とその塔頭は廃寺とされたが、学頭寺の舎那院のみは残され、新放生寺や塔頭の[[仏像]]や資料等が全て移された。また、当宮は名称を長浜八幡宮と改めている。 [[1885年]]（明治18年）に雷火によって本殿が焼失したが、[[1889年]]（明治22年）に再建されている。[[1895年]]（明治28年）には[[県社]]に列せられている。 [[2006年]]（[[平成]]18年）に[[神社本庁]]の[[別表神社]]に加列されている。 当宮の東隣に舎那院がある。 == 境内 == * 本殿 - [[1889年]]（[[明治]]22年）再建。[[八幡宮]]としては非常にめずらしい[[神明造]]で建てられている。一説によれば[[伊勢神宮]]から御饌殿を譲り受けたともされる[http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ 長浜八幡宮ホームページ 境内 社殿]。 * 幣殿 * 拝殿 * 能舞台 * 神輿庫 * 願い通して矢 * 社務所 * 斎館 * 参集殿 * 放生池（長浜市指定[[名勝]]） * 包丁塚 * 絵馬堂 * [[アジサイ|あじさい]]園 - 現在休園中。 === 摂末社 === * [[都久夫須麻神社]] - 祭神：[[イチキシマヒメ|市杵島姫神]]。[[摂社]]。 * [[天満宮]] - 祭神：[[菅原道真]]。摂社。 * [[高良神社]] - 祭神：[[武内宿禰]]。摂社。 * [[金刀比羅宮]]・河濯（かわそぎ）神社 - 金刀比羅宮祭神：[[大物主命]]、河濯神社祭神：[[瀬織津姫]]命。摂社。 * 末広[[稲荷神社]] - 祭神：[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂]]、[[サタヒコ|佐田彦神]]、[[オオミヤノメ|大宮能売神]]。[[末社]]。 * [[地主神社]] - 祭神：[[地主神|大地主命]]。末社。 * [[熊野神社]]：祭神 - [[熊野権現|家津御子命、熊野速玉命、熊野夫須美命]]。末社。 == 文化財 == === 滋賀県指定有形文化財 === * 梅樹双雀文鏡 1面 - [[南北朝時代 (日本)|南北朝時代]]。 * 能装束（紅地扇面散文様唐織能装束、縹淡茶段松皮菱牡丹輪宝文様唐織能装束） 2領 - [[江戸時代]]。 * 太鼓 1口、太鼓台 1基 - [[室町時代]]。[[文安]]元年、永尾護国寺等の墨書銘がある。 * 書跡等 [[永享]]七年勧進猿楽奉加帳ならびに永享十一年塔供養奉加帳 2帖 - 室町時代。 * 書跡等 版本倭点附刻妙法蓮華経 8巻 - 室町時代。 === 長浜市指定有形文化財 === * 鉄鋳造鍔口 1口 - [[桃山時代]]。 * 書跡 天正八年三月吉日[[豊臣秀吉|羽柴秀吉]]・同[[羽柴秀勝|秀勝]]連署奉加帳 1帖 - 桃山時代。 === 長浜市指定名勝 === * 放生池 - 桃山時代。 == 祭事 == * [[長浜曳山祭]] - 4月12日～17日朝。[[安土桃山時代]]に始まる伝統行事。日本三大山車祭の一つ。 * 春季大祭 - 4月15日 * 例祭 - 10月15日 == 前後の札所 == ; [[神仏霊場巡拝の道]] : 136 [[西明寺 (滋賀県甲良町)|西明寺]]　-　'''137 長浜八幡宮'''　-　138 [[宝厳寺]] ; [[六瓢箪めぐり]] == 所在地 == * 滋賀県長浜市宮前町13-55 == アクセス == * [[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[北陸本線]] [[長浜駅]]より徒歩約15分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist}} == 周辺情報 == * [[舎那院]] * [[浄土真宗|真宗]][[真宗大谷派|大谷派]] [[真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|長浜別院 大通寺]] * [[黒壁スクエア]] * [[長浜赤十字病院]] == 外部リンク == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ 曳山祭 長浜八幡宮] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:なかはまはちまんくう}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]] [[Category:別表神社]] [[Category:鎮守社]] [[Category:豊臣秀吉|社なかはま]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=滋賀県}}

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} | founded={{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:Pages needing history import]] [[Category:Qq]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} | founded={{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}}

A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} | founded={{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:beppyo shrines without templates]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama]] [[Category:History of Nagahama]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[sn:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[en:Nagahama Hachimangu]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} | founded={{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiga Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama|qq=}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrines|ja|別表神社|1=Beppyo Shrine|2=ja|3=別表神社|4=simple|5=Beppyo shrine|6=zh|7=別表神社|8=mr|9=बेप्प्यो तीर्थ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo shrines|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppyo Shrine|qq=}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu Bunri|ja|神仏分離|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Bunri|qq=}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|ja|都久夫須麻神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukubusuma Shrine|qq=}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi-Momoyama period|ja|安土桃山時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi-Momoyama period|qq=}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|ja|琵琶湖線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Biwako Line|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|ja|長浜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Station|qq=}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|ja|浄土真宗|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū|qq=}} {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|ja|真宗大谷派|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|qq=}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|ja|1069th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1069|qq=}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|ja|後三条天皇|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Sanjō|qq=}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshiie|qq=}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|ja|石清水八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qq=}}.
