Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | founded=[[:en:1069|1069]] | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=|1=Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}}

{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | founded=[[:en:1069|1069]] | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=|1=Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}}

Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}}

[[sn:commons:Category:Nagahama-hachimangu]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11653283]] Wikidata name: Nagahama Hachiman-gū [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:23, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location=[[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | founded=[[:en:1069|1069]] | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|qq=|1=Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|qq=|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}}

It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|qq=|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|qq=|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|qq=|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|qq=|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|qq=|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|qq=|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}}

[[sn:commons:Category:Nagahama-hachimangu]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11653283]] Wikidata name: Nagahama Hachiman-gū [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:23, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location=[[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | founded=[[:en:1069|1069]] | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|1=Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}}

{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | founded=[[:en:1069|1069]] | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|1=Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}}

It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama period]]. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR [[:en:Biwako Line|Biwako Line]] [[:en:Nagahama Station|Nagahama Station]] == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * [[:en:Jōdo Shinshū|Jōdo Shinshū]] [[:en:Ōtani-ha|Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha]] {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a [[:en:Beppyo shrine|Beppyo Shrine]]. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ([[:en:1069|1069]]) by the decree of [[:en:Emperor Go-Sanjō|Emperor Go-Sanjō]], upon the petition of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]], who brought a divided spirit of [[:en:Iwashimizu Hachimangū|Iwashimizu Hachimangū]]. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the [[:en:Shinbutsu bunri|Shinbutsu Bunri]] decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: [[:en:Tsukubusuma Shrine|Tsukubusuma Shrine]] * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17.
