{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Emperor Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | founded={{ill|1069|en|1069|WD=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|1=Sacred Sites of Kamigata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=Matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nagahama, Shiga|en|Nagahama, Shiga|WD=Q844130|lt=Nagahama|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrine|en|Beppyo shrine|WD=Q10898274|lt=Beppyo Shrine|1=Beppyo shrine}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|en|1069|WD=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu bunri|en|Shinbutsu bunri|WD=Q1970535|lt=Shinbutsu Bunri|1=Shinbutsu bunri}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Emperor Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|en|Tsukubusuma Shrine|WD=Q11643470|lt=Tsukubusuma Shrine|1=Tsukubusuma Shrine}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=Matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|WD=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|en|Biwako Line|WD=Q804135|lt=Biwako Line|1=Biwako Line}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|en|Nagahama Station|WD=Q1037083|lt=Nagahama Station|1=Nagahama Station}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|en|Jōdo Shinshū|WD=Q912221|lt=Jōdo Shinshū|1=Jōdo Shinshū}} {{ill|Ōtani-ha|en|Ōtani-ha|WD=Q7108435|lt=Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|1=Ōtani-ha}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages]]

A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|WD=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|en|Biwako Line|WD=Q804135|lt=Biwako Line|1=Biwako Line}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|en|Nagahama Station|WD=Q1037083|lt=Nagahama Station|1=Nagahama Station}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|en|Jōdo Shinshū|WD=Q912221|lt=Jōdo Shinshū|1=Jōdo Shinshū}} {{ill|Ōtani-ha|en|Ōtani-ha|WD=Q7108435|lt=Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|1=Ōtani-ha}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[co:commons:Category:Nagahama-hachimangu]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[co:commons:Category:Nagahama-hachimangu]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[Category:sn_crud|commons:Category:Nagahama-hachimangu]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nagahama, Shiga|en|Nagahama, Shiga|WD=Q844130|lt=Nagahama|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Emperor Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | founded={{ill|1069|en|1069|WD=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|1=Sacred Sites of Kamigata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=Matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nagahama, Shiga|en|Nagahama, Shiga|WD=Q844130|lt=Nagahama|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrine|en|Beppyo shrine|WD=Q10898274|lt=Beppyo Shrine|1=Beppyo shrine}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|en|1069|WD=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|WD=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|WD=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu bunri|en|Shinbutsu bunri|WD=Q1970535|lt=Shinbutsu Bunri|1=Shinbutsu bunri}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Emperor Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|en|Tsukubusuma Shrine|WD=Q11643470|lt=Tsukubusuma Shrine|1=Tsukubusuma Shrine}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=Matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|WD=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|en|Biwako Line|WD=Q804135|lt=Biwako Line|1=Biwako Line}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|en|Nagahama Station|WD=Q1037083|lt=Nagahama Station|1=Nagahama Station}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11613521}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|en|Jōdo Shinshū|WD=Q912221|lt=Jōdo Shinshū|1=Jōdo Shinshū}} {{ill|Ōtani-ha|en|Ōtani-ha|WD=Q7108435|lt=Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|1=Ōtani-ha}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu bunri|en|Shinbutsu bunri|qid=Q1970535|lt=Shinbutsu Bunri|1=Shinbutsu bunri}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Emperor Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|en|Tsukubusuma Shrine|qid=Q11643470|lt=Tsukubusuma Shrine|1=Tsukubusuma Shrine}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=Matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|qid=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|en|Biwako Line|qid=Q804135|lt=Biwako Line|1=Biwako Line}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|en|Nagahama Station|qid=Q1037083|lt=Nagahama Station|1=Nagahama Station}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11613521}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|en|Jōdo Shinshū|qid=Q912221|lt=Jōdo Shinshū|1=Jōdo Shinshū}} {{ill|Ōtani-ha|en|Ōtani-ha|qid=Q7108435|lt=Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|1=Ōtani-ha}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Nagahama-hachimangu]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[co:commons:Category:Nagahama-hachimangu]][[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Nagahama Hachimangu | location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nagahama, Shiga|en|Nagahama, Shiga|qid=Q844130|lt=Nagahama|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, Miyamae Town 13-55 | type_deg=35|Rank_min=22|Rank_sec=57.5|N/S=N | longitude_deg=136|longitude_min=16|longitude_sec=27.6|E/W=E | map_country_code=JP | deity={{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}}
{{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Emperor Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q179971}}
{{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q232803}} | Shrine_Rank={{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} | founded={{ill|1069|en|1069|qid=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}} | Main_hall=Shinmei-zukuri | Pilgrimage={{ill|Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|ja|神仏霊場巡拝の道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbutsu Reijō Junpai no Michi|1=Sacred Sites of Kamigata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10444949}} No. 137 (Shiga No. 5) | annual_festival={{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=Matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11470974}} (April 12-17) | Rituals= | image=[[File:Nagahama hachimangu02s3200.jpg|250px]]
Main hall | map=Japan Shiga }} [[File:Nagahama hachimangu01s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Worship hall]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu04s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Tsukubusuma Shrine, auxiliary shrine]] [[File:Nagahama hachimangu06s3200.jpg|thumb|224px|Stone lanterns on the approach]] '''Nagahama Hachimangu''' (長浜八幡宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nagahama, Shiga|en|Nagahama, Shiga|qid=Q844130|lt=Nagahama|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, Miyamae Town. It is a former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} and is currently a {{ill|Beppyo shrine|en|Beppyo shrine|qid=Q10898274|lt=Beppyo Shrine|1=Beppyo shrine}}. It is famous for the {{ill|Nagahama Hikiyama festival|ja|長浜曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Hikiyama festival|1=Nagahama Hikiyama Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11653306}}, one of the {{ill|Three Great Float festivals of Japan|ja|日本三大一覧#祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Great Float festivals of Japan|1=Japan's Top 3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10311536}}. == History == According to tradition, it was founded in the late Heian period ({{ill|1069|en|1069|qid=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}}) by the decree of {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|qid=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}, upon the petition of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|qid=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}}, who brought a divided spirit of {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|en|Iwashimizu Hachimangū|qid=Q710098|lt=Iwashimizu Hachimangū|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangū}}. During the {{ill|Sengoku period|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q117415390}}, it fell into decline due to war, but was restored by {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} when he became the lord of {{ill|Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|ja|長浜城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Castle (Ōmi Province)|1=Burg Nagahama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q621281}}. Since the Heian period, the temple {{ill|Shinhōjū-ji|ja|新放生寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinhōjū-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 舎那院|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11613521}} existed within the grounds as the temple attached to the shrine, but it was abolished during the early Meiji period under the {{ill|Shinbutsu bunri|en|Shinbutsu bunri|qid=Q1970535|lt=Shinbutsu Bunri|1=Shinbutsu bunri}} decree, and all statues and documents were transferred to its remaining sub-temple, {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11613521}}. == Deities == * East Hall - {{ill|Emperor Chūai|ja|足仲彦尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Chūai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仲哀天皇|1=Emperor Chūai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q179971}} * Middle Hall - {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} * West Hall - {{ill|Empress Jingū|ja|息長足姫尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jingū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q232803}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] == Grounds == * Worship hall * Main hall * Auxiliary shrine: Kōra Shrine * Auxiliary shrine: {{ill|Tsukubusuma Shrine|en|Tsukubusuma Shrine|qid=Q11643470|lt=Tsukubusuma Shrine|1=Tsukubusuma Shrine}} * Auxiliary shrine: Tenmangū * Auxiliary shrine: Konpiragū * Subordinate shrine: Suehiro Inari Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Jishu Shrine * Subordinate shrine: Kumano Shrine * Wish-fulfilling arrow == Events and festivals == * {{ill|Hikiyama festival|ja|曳山祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikiyama festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山車|1=Matsuri float|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11470974}} – April 12-17. A traditional event dating back to the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|qid=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}}. One of the Three Great Float festivals of Japan. == Access == * 13-minute walk from JR {{ill|Biwako Line|en|Biwako Line|qid=Q804135|lt=Biwako Line|1=Biwako Line}} {{ill|Nagahama Station|en|Nagahama Station|qid=Q1037083|lt=Nagahama Station|1=Nagahama Station}} == Nearby Information == * {{ill|Shana-in|ja|舎那院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shana-in|1=Shana-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11613521}} * {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū|en|Jōdo Shinshū|qid=Q912221|lt=Jōdo Shinshū|1=Jōdo Shinshū}} {{ill|Ōtani-ha|en|Ōtani-ha|qid=Q7108435|lt=Jōdo Shinshū Ōtani-ha|1=Ōtani-ha}} {{ill|Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|ja|真宗大谷派長浜別院大通寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Betsuin Daitsu-ji|1=Daitsū-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11583061}} * {{ill|Kurokabe Square|ja|黒壁スクエア|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurokabe Square|1=Kurokabe square|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11678068}} * {{ill|Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|ja|長浜赤十字病院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|1=Nagahama Red Cross Hospital|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11653322}} == External links == {{Commons|Category:Nagahama-hachimangu}} * [http://www.biwa.ne.jp/~hatimang/ Hikiyama festival Nagahama Hachimangu] {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub-Shiga}} {{Beppyo Shrines}} {{citation needed|ja|阿賀神社|version=102029703|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:阿賀神社]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] [[ja:長浜八幡宮]] {{translated page|ja|長浜八幡宮|version=104212073|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Nagahama-hachimangu}} {{wikidata link|Q11653283}} [[Category:Beppyo shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:Chinjusha]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Shinto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] [[Category:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
